"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:39 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_real_response_after_retry.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='real_claude_response_present':
    status='process_real_response_next'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
elif ps=='no_dispatch_results_after_response_retry':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_result_writer_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair missing dispatch result writer after retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_writer_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify result writer'
elif ps=='dispatch_present_runtime_missing':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair missing Claude runtime after dispatch proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
elif ps=='runtime_present_real_response_missing':
    status='real_response_writer_repair_required'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher prompt/provider/write path to force real claude_to_gpt response'
else:
    status='unknown_bem842_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-842 status and proof files'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_route_after_bem842.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Route After BEM-842 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json','governance/reports/bem843_route_after_bem842.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-842 and queued the next targeted proof repair if needed')
